$comment: F-026 kit config. Live /design-sync schema (Claude Code v2.1.185): top-level keys are validated STRICTLY — an unknown or removed key fails the run with a named fix and there is no compat code, so emit ONLY keys confirmed live-valid. `pkg` + `globalName` are the only required ones. Confirmed-valid keys used here: pkg, globalName, projectId, shape, buildCmd, srcDir, cssEntry, extraFonts, readmeHeader. Other live keys exist (tsconfig, extraEntries, componentSrcMap, dtsPropsFor, tokensPkg, tokensGlob, docsDir, docsMap, guidelinesGlob, runtimeFontPrefixes, replaces, libOverrides, provider) — add them only when actually needed. NOTE: the schema row for lib-script forks is `libOverrides` (not `overrides`); per-component preview tweaks go under `overrides.<Name>` (cardMode/skip/primaryStory) only when you actually have one — never an empty map. Re-pin the schema against the live skill before each major run; the contract is server-side/version-fluid (the base command fetches live via get_claude_design_prompt).
projectId: {{set after the target Claude Design project is created/chosen}}
